paragraph_reconciliation.excerpt: Kivo Video P8 Subtitle Plane 终极设计书 V1.5.5
Task ID: KIVO-VIDEO-P8-SUBTITLE-PLANE-DESIGN-LOCK-001-V1.5.5
Document Type: architecture-design / implementation-baseline / c-header-closure / c-abi-purist-closure / no-noexcept-in-c-header / bootstrap-status-lock / api-p
Status: FINAL_DESIGN_BASELINE_CANDIDATE_FOR_P8A_IMPLEMENTATION_PLANNING
0. 最终执行口令
P8 = Subtitle Plane Core。
P8 public ABI 必须能作为 纯 C header 被 C 编译器包含。 P8 不允许把 C++ ABI、Qt、FFmpeg、Win32 renderer、STL 容器、C++ exception/noexcept 直接暴露到 C ABI。
V1.5.5 的目标不是扩功能，而是完成最后一层：
text id="p8v155-final-goal" True C ABI header closure all referenced public C types closure bootstrap/version negotiation closure source reader vtable version c
V1.5.5 继承 V1.5.4 的所有非冲突内容。 凡本版与 V1.5.4 冲突，以 V1.5.5 为准。
1. V1.5.5 修正总表
本版修复以下遗漏：
text id="p8v155-fixes" C-001: 定义 KIVO_P8_API_V1_REQUIRED_PREFIX_SIZE。 C-002: C ABI header 中不再直接写 noexcept。 C-003: source reader / observer / executor callback 中
2. Public C Header 基线
2.1 Header include
P8 C ABI header 只允许：
c id="p8v155-include" #include <stdint.h> #include <stddef.h>
不使用 <stdbool.h> 作为 ABI 返回值基础。 跨语言 ABI 统一使用 uint32_t status / bool-like value。
2.2 Noexcept 宏
C ABI header 不得直接写 C++ noexcept。 允许统一宏：
c id="p8v155-noexcept" #ifdef __cplusplus #define KIVO_P8_NOEXCEPT noexcept #else #define KIVO_P8_NOEXCEPT #endif
所有 public function / callback signature 使用 KIVO_P8_NOEXCEPT，不得直接写裸 noexcept。
2.3 Calling convention / export
```c id=“p8v155-call-export” #if defined(_WIN32) #define KIVO_P8_CALL __cdecl #if defined(KIVO_P8_BUILD_DLL) #define KIVO_P8_EXPORT __declspec(dllexport) #else
#ifdef __cplusplus extern “C” { #endif
typedef struct KivoSubtitlePlaneHandle KivoSubtitlePlaneHandle;
#ifdef __cplusplus } #endif
## 2.4 Forbidden C ABI tokens  ```text id="p8v155-forbidden-c-header" std:: std::uint32_t std::uint64_t std::size_t bool as ABI return type enum class noexcept
3. ABI Version / Status / Struct Header
3.1 Version constants
c id="p8v155-version" #define KIVO_P8_ABI_MAJOR 1u #define KIVO_P8_ABI_MINOR 5u #define KIVO_P8_ABI_PATCH 5u #define KIVO_P8_ABI_REVISION 155u
3.2 API status
Bootstrap 不再返回 bool，返回明确 status。
c id="p8v155-api-status" typedef enum KivoP8ApiStatus {     KivoP8ApiStatus_Ok = 0,     KivoP8ApiStatus_NullPointer = 1,     KivoP8ApiStatus_ApiTableTooSmall =
3.3 Callback status
所有外部 callback/vtable 返回统一 status。
c id="p8v155-callback-status" typedef enum KivoP8CallbackStatus {     KivoP8CallbackStatus_Ok = 0,     KivoP8CallbackStatus_Failed = 1,     KivoP8CallbackStatus
3.4 ABI struct header
c id="p8v155-abi-header" typedef struct KivoP8AbiHeader {     uint32_t struct_size;     uint16_t struct_version;     uint16_t flags; } KivoP8AbiHeader;
Rules：
text id="p8v155-abi-header-rules" 1. 所有跨 DLL 顶层 request/config/result/descriptor/vtable/function-table struct 必须以 KivoP8AbiHeader 开头。 2. 调用方必须填写 struct_size = s
4. API Bootstrap
4.1 Required prefix size
KivoSubtitlePlaneApiV1 的 required prefix 定义为：
text id="p8v155-prefix-semantic" required prefix = KivoP8AbiHeader + abi_major + abi_minor + abi_patch + abi_revision
宏定义：
c id="p8v155-prefix-macro" #define KIVO_P8_API_V1_REQUIRED_PREFIX_SIZE \     ((uint32_t)(sizeof(KivoP8AbiHeader) + (4u * sizeof(uint32_t))))
实现可额外使用 offsetof(KivoSubtitlePlaneApiV1, create) 做静态一致性检查。
4.2 Bootstrap function
```c id=“p8v155-bootstrap” typedef struct KivoSubtitlePlaneApiV1 KivoSubtitlePlaneApiV1;
KIVO_P8_EXPORT KivoP8ApiStatus KIVO_P8_CALL kivo_subtitle_plane_get_api_v1( uint32_t requested_abi_revision, KivoSubtitlePlaneApiV1* out_api, uint32_t out_api_s
Rules：  ```text id="p8v155-bootstrap-rules" 1. out_api == NULL -> KivoP8ApiStatus_NullPointer。 2. out_api_size < KIVO_P8_API_V1_REQUIRED_PREFIX_SIZE -> ApiTable

5.1 Time / Revision / Epoch

typedef struct KivoSubtitleDelayOffset { int64_t microseconds; } KivoSubtitleDelayOffset;
typedef struct KivoSubtitleSeekEpoch { uint64_t value; } KivoSubtitleSeekEpoch;
typedef struct KivoP8PlaybackRevision { uint64_t value; } KivoP8PlaybackRevision;
typedef struct KivoP8GraphSnapshotRevision { uint64_t value; } KivoP8GraphSnapshotRevision;
Rules：  ```text id="p8v155-time-rules" KivoSubtitleTime.microseconds == INT64_MIN means invalid public time. KivoSubtitleDelayOffset range = [-24h, +24h]. KivoP

c id="p8v155-ids" typedef struct KivoSubtitleCommandId { uint64_t value; } KivoSubtitleCommandId; typedef struct KivoSubtitleCorrelationId { uint64_t value; } K
Rules：
text id="p8v155-id-rules" 1. value == 0 means invalid. 2. 0 is never a valid allocated ID. 3. Caller must not invent internal IDs except by receiving them from

---  # 7. Byte / String Input Types  ## 7.1 Input string  ```c id="p8v155-input-string" typedef struct KivoSubtitleInputStringView {     const uint8_t* utf8;
Rules：
text id="p8v155-input-string-rules" 1. Valid only during current call. 2. P8 copies if retained. 3. Not NUL-terminated unless caller includes NUL in utf8_bytes.
7.2 Input bytes
统一名称只允许：
c id="p8v155-input-bytes" typedef struct KivoSubtitleInputBytesView {     const uint8_t* data;     uint64_t bytes; } KivoSubtitleInputBytesView;
禁止再出现：
text id="p8v155-forbidden-input-name" KivoInputBytesView
7.3 Mutable byte span

Rules：
text id="p8v155-mutable-span-rules" 1. data == NULL && bytes == 0 allowed only for explicit size-query capable APIs. 2. data == NULL && bytes > 0 -> MalformedIn
8. Generation Types
8.1 Content generation
c id="p8v155-content-generation" typedef struct KivoSubtitleContentGeneration {     uint64_t source_generation;     uint64_t track_generation;     uint64_t pars

c id="p8v155-packet-generation" typedef struct KivoSubtitlePacketGeneration {     uint64_t source_generation;     uint64_t track_generation;     KivoSubtitleSee

Rules：
text id="p8v155-generation-rules" 1. delay_epoch never invalidates parsed cues. 2. seek_epoch never invalidates static external cue index. 3. embedded packets a

10. Source Reader Contract
10.1 Source handle / seek origin

typedef enum KivoSubtitleSeekOrigin { KivoSubtitleSeekOrigin_Begin = 0, KivoSubtitleSeekOrigin_Current = 1, KivoSubtitleSeekOrigin_End = 2 } KivoSubtitleSeekOri
## 10.2 Source kind  ```c id="p8v155-source-kind" typedef enum KivoSubtitleSourceKind {     KivoSubtitleSourceKind_Unknown = 0,     KivoSubtitleSourceKind_FileP
10.3 Source vtable
KivoSubtitleExternalSourceVTable is V1 frozen and versioned through KivoP8AbiHeader.
```c id=“p8v155-source-vtable” typedef struct KivoSubtitleExternalSourceVTable { KivoP8AbiHeader header; void* user_data;
KivoP8CallbackStatus (KIVO_P8_CALL *open)(     void* user_data,     const struct KivoSubtitleSourceDescriptor* source,     KivoSubtitleSourceHandle* out_handle
} KivoSubtitleExternalSourceVTable;
Rules：  ```text id="p8v155-source-vtable-rules" 1. V1 required callbacks for Reader/ProviderByteStream: open/read/close. 2. seek/tell may be NULL only if source
10.4 Source descriptor
```c id=“p8v155-source-desc” typedef struct KivoSubtitleSourceDescriptor { KivoP8AbiHeader header; KivoSubtitleSourceKind kind; KivoSubtitleSourceId source_id;
KivoSubtitleInputStringView file_path_utf8; KivoSubtitleInputBytesView memory_bytes;  KivoSubtitleExternalSourceVTable reader;  KivoRedactedSourceIdentity redac
} KivoSubtitleSourceDescriptor;
Flags：  ```text id="p8v155-source-flags" bit 0 = seekable bit 1 = reader_callbacks_thread_safe bit 2 = file_access_allowed bit 3 = memory_must_copy_immediately
Rules：
```text id=“p8v155-source-rules” FilePathUtf8: file_path_utf8 valid only during call. raw path never enters evidence. P8 may open only when file access feature
MemoryBytes: memory_bytes valid only during call. P8 copies before async parse.
Reader/ProviderByteStream: P8 owns handle after open success. P8 closes handle exactly once. cancel may race with read; source vtable must tolerate cancel durin

12. Plane State / Timeline
12.1 Plane state
c id="p8v155-plane-state" typedef enum KivoSubtitlePlaneState {     KivoSubtitlePlaneState_NotCreated = 0,     KivoSubtitlePlaneState_Created = 1,     KivoSubti

12.3 Revision equality
```text id=“p8v155-revision-equal” request revision == latest state revision: not a conflict. build_frame proceeds using request playback_time and matching stat
request revision < latest: stale request; emit TimelineInconsistent evidence.
request revision > latest: allowed if request carries newer graph/playback revision from P7 adapter; P8 updates diagnostics but does not mutate state from build
---  # 13. Frame Lease  ## 13.1 Status  ```c id="p8v155-frame-lease-status" typedef enum KivoSubtitleFrameLeaseStatus {     KivoSubtitleFrameLeaseStatus_Ok = 0,

Rules：
text id="p8v155-frame-lease-rules" 1. frame is an opaque pointer to KivoSubtitleFrame layout defined in frame header. 2. lease_id == 0 means no release required

text id="p8v155-endian" P8 P0 baseline is Windows x64 little-endian. P8 copy_snapshot always emits little-endian blob. Big-endian host is unsupported in P8 P0 a

text id="p8v155-snapshot-close" 1. snapshot_active_lease_capacity default = 32. 2. close waits snapshot_lease_close_timeout_ms default = 2000. 3. after timeout,

```text id=“p8v155-resource-rules” FrameLease token: kind = FrameLease lease_id = frame_lease.lease_id lease_generation = frame_lease.lease_generation snapshot_
SnapshotLease token: kind = SnapshotLease snapshot_lease_id = snapshot_lease.snapshot_lease_id snapshot_lease_generation = snapshot_lease.snapshot_lease_generat
snapshot_revision is required for both token kinds. Only the other-kind ID/generation fields must be zero. Non-zero irrelevant ID/generation fields -> Malformed

17.2 Priority rule fix

18. Cancellation View
volatile uint32_t* is forbidden as cross-thread synchronization contract.
```c id=“p8v155-cancel-view” typedef struct KivoSubtitleCancellationView { uint64_t operation_id; void* user_data;
KivoP8CallbackStatus (KIVO_P8_CALL *is_cancelled)(     void* user_data,     uint64_t operation_id,     uint32_t* out_cancelled ) KIVO_P8_NOEXCEPT;
} KivoSubtitleCancellationView;
Rules：  ```text id="p8v155-cancel-rules" 1. out_cancelled == NULL -> InvalidArgument. 2. is_cancelled may be called from worker thread. 3. callback must be thre
19. Observer Callbacks
```c id=“p8v155-observer” typedef struct KivoSubtitleEvent KivoSubtitleEvent;
typedef struct KivoSubtitleObserverCallbacks { KivoP8AbiHeader header;
void (KIVO_P8_CALL *on_event)(     void* user_data,     const KivoSubtitleEvent* event ) KIVO_P8_NOEXCEPT;
} KivoSubtitleObserverCallbacks;
Rules：  ```text id="p8v155-observer-rules" 1. callbacks == NULL or callbacks->on_event == NULL -> subscribe returns invalid token. 2. Observer callback must not
20. Embedded Stream End Request
c id="p8v155-stream-end" typedef struct KivoEmbeddedSubtitleStreamEndRequest {     KivoP8AbiHeader header;     KivoSubtitleTrackId track_id;     KivoSubtitlePac
Flags：
text id="p8v155-stream-end-flags" bit 0 = eos bit 1 = source_discontinuity bit 2 = parser_drain_requested
Rules：
text id="p8v155-stream-end-rules" 1. stream end with eos marks embedded stream EOS for matching packet_generation. 2. stale generation -> ignored with evidence.
21. ASS / SSA / WebVTT Closure
21.1 SSA
text id="p8v155-ssa" SSA v4.00 uses SSA style/dialogue grammar. ASS-specific tags absent in SSA are ignored/unsupported with evidence. SSA line breaks follow AS
21.2 ASS color / alpha
```text id=“p8v155-ass-color” ASS color is BGR. quals \1c. \1c primary. \2c secondary. \3c outline. \4c shadow.
ASS alpha is inverse: 00 = opaque. FF = transparent.
applies to all channels unless channel-specific alpha overrides. \1a/\2a/\3a/\4a override matching channel. Inline override wins over style default. Malformed c
## 21.3 ASS PlayRes missing  ```text id="p8v155-playres" If PlayResX/Y missing: 1. P8 uses NormalizedFallback. 2. P8 does not invent video pixel size. 3. emits
21.4 WebVTT cue settings
```text id=“p8v155-webvtt-settings” line: maps to line position metadata. percent uses 0.0..100.0 WebVttPercent.
position: maps to x/anchor metadata.
size: maps to width percent.
align: maps to horizontal alignment.
vertical: stored as metadata/unsupported evidence in P8 P0.
region: maps to SubtitleRegion if valid.
snap-to-lines: stored as metadata flag; P9 decides final layout.
---  # 22. Ambiguity Closures  ## 22.1 UINT64_MAX cap  ```text id="p8v155-uint64max-cap" cap == UINT64_MAX:   return MalformedInput / InvalidCapValue. P8 P0 doe
22.2 Late packet before timeline
text id="p8v155-late-cold-start" If no valid timeline state has been received:   P8 must not late-drop embedded packets by playback time.   P8 may queue within
22.3 EOS epsilon
text id="p8v155-eos-epsilon" EOS hold epsilon = subtitle_time_compare_epsilon_us from runtime caps. If frame_duration_hint exists, effective epsilon may be clam
22.4 Hazard retry bound
text id="p8v155-hazard-bound" rcu_hazard_acquire_max_retries = 3 default. If retries exhausted:   build_frame returns TemporarilyUnavailable/Error by policy.
23. ABI Layout Gate
All public C ABI structs must have layout tests.
Required checks：
text id="p8v155-layout-gate" 1. sizeof(struct) % 8 == 0 for all cross-DLL top-level structs. 2. _Alignof(struct) >= 8 where supported or explicitly documented n
If a small wrapper struct naturally has 8-byte size but lower formal alignment:
text id="p8v155-small-align" Allowed only if: 1. it contains one uint64_t field, or 2. ABI layout test records size/offset, 3. it is passed by value only where
24. Snapshot Blob Endian Responsibility
text id="p8v155-endian-responsibility" 1. P8 P0 target is Windows x64 little-endian. 2. copy_snapshot emits little-endian blob. 3. Big-endian host unsupported.
25. Snapshot / Frame Lease Close Policy
text id="p8v155-close-lease-policy" 1. close waits frame leases up to subtitle_frame_lease_close_timeout_ms. 2. close waits snapshot leases up to snapshot_lease

The V1 function table from V1.5.4 remains, with these mandatory changes:
text id="p8v155-function-table-delta" 1. All bare noexcept replaced by KIVO_P8_NOEXCEPT. 2. All bool returns replaced by KivoP8ApiStatus or KivoP8CallbackStatus

---  # 30. Closure Definition  V1.5.5 can be considered the P8 design baseline only when:  ```text id="p8v155-closure" 1. All V1.5.5 exit criteria are represent
Implementation completion state:
text id="p8v155-final-state" Subtitle Plane CLOSED. Ready for P9 Player Runtime Shell / Qt Adapter.
31. Final Delivery Statement
P8 implementation completed from this design must be able to state:
```text id=“p8v155-final-statement” Kivo Video P8 Subtitle Plane exposes a pure C ABI.
The public C header compiles in a C compiler. No bare noexcept appears in the C ABI header. No std:: namespace appears in the C ABI header. The bootstrap API re
All referenced public C types are fully defined. KivoMutableByteSpan is defined. KivoSubtitleInputBytesView is the only input bytes view name. FrameLease, Snaps
Source reader vtable is versioned. Observer callback table is versioned. Cancellation uses callback-based polling, not volatile pointer. ResourceAccessToken rul
Privacy hash algorithm and key provider are defined. source_identity_hash, basename_hash, and content_fingerprint_hash have deterministic rules. UINT64_MAX caps
SSA behavior, ASS color/alpha, ASS PlayRes missing fallback, and WebVTT cue settings are defined.
Public headers contain no Qt/FFmpeg/Win32 renderer types and no forbidden C++ ABI types. Frame path contains no mutex/shared_mutex/blocking wait. No P4/P5/P6/P7
END OF KIVO VIDEO P8 SUBTITLE PLANE DESIGN V1.5.5
